step_rationale: Glutathione reductase upregulated by oxLDL; antioxidant defense enzyme responding to lipid oxidation.
mechanism: GSR expression increases in response to oxidized-LDL, sustaining antioxidant capacity against oxidative modification of retained lipids.

references.title: Oxidized LDL induces a coordinated up-regulation of the glutathione and thioredoxin systems in human macrophages.
